name: Win/Loss Debrief Generator - Backstory Starter
description: Automatically generates a structured win/loss debrief when any deal closes (won or lost). Triggered by a CRM webhook on stage change, the workflow pulls the full engagement timeline from Backstory — every meeting, email, contact involved, and engagement cadence throughout the deal cycle. An AI agent analyzes the timeline to produce a structured debrief: what worked, where engagement dropped, key turning points, multi-threading effectiveness, and lessons learned. The debrief is delivered to the rep, their manager, and optionally a shared enablement channel.

nodes.notes: Webhook — CRM deal stage change to Closed Won/Lost   |

nodes.name: Analyze Win/Loss Debrief Generator

parameters.text:
=You are generating the Win/Loss Debrief Generator workflow output.

PURPOSE:
Automatically generates a structured win/loss debrief when any deal closes (won or lost). Triggered by a CRM webhook on stage change, the workflow pulls the full engagement timeline from Backstory — every meeting, email, contact involved, and engagement cadence throughout the deal cycle. An AI agent analyzes the timeline to produce a structured debrief: what worked, where engagement dropped, key turning points, multi-threading effectiveness, and lessons learned. The debrief is delivered to the rep, their manager, and optionally a shared enablement channel.

SOURCE PAYLOAD:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.record, null, 2) }}

TASKS:
1. Use Backstory MCP to enrich the record with the most relevant account, opportunity, engagement, or stakeholder context.
2. Decide what matters most for the win/loss debrief generator use case.
3. Produce a concise markdown summary with: headline, key findings, risks, recommended actions, and routing notes if applicable.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS:
- Keep it compact enough for Slack.
- Prefer bullets.
- Mention concrete dates, owners, amounts, or stages when the data provides them.
- If the source record is incomplete, explicitly say what is missing.

REFERENCE STYLE:
🏆 **WIN DEBRIEF** — Globex Industries | ===$340,000=== | Closed Won

📊 **DEAL SNAPSHOT:**
- Cycle length: 67 days (benchmark: 82 days) — 18% faster than avg
- Contacts engaged: 9 across 4 departments
- Total meetings: 14 | Emails: 87 | Multi-thread score: A

🔑 **WHAT WORKED:**
- Early multi-threading: @sarah.chen engaged VP Engineering and CFO by Week 2 — both became internal advocates
- Competitive positioning: Proactively addressed Vendara comparison in Week 3 before prospect raised it

options.systemMessage: You are a Backstory workflow analyst generating Win/Loss Debrief Generator outputs. Keep the response actionable, concrete, and Slack-friendly.

nodes.notes: Wire your preferred LLM credentials to the chat model node after import.

nodes.name: Backstory MCP
nodes.notes: This mirrors the existing workflow infrastructure in the repo. Add MCP auth headers after import.

nodes.name: Aggregate Results
nodes.notes: Collapses all analyzed records into a single outbound summary. Replace this with per-owner routing if you want one message per rep/CSM/executive.

nodes.name: Post to Slack
nodes.notes: Swap this node for Teams or SMTP if Slack is not your delivery target.
